candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above financial items, but it is not labelled as cost of sales / cost of revenues / COR / COGS and does not clearly belong to the selected COGS bucket 'Materials and Services'. Using it for COGS_DA would risk misclassification.
A component-level D&A row exists, but there is also a higher-level summary row 'Depreciation and amortization'. It is not specifically tied to COGS.
Looks like a component/detail under total D&A rather than a COGS-specific D&A row.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Materials and Services'. The excerpt shows no explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row. The separate total D&A line appears to be an operating expense outside that bucket, but not specifically attributable to COGS, so no COGS_DA row should be added.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A summary row shown separately at the same level as the selected overhead rows and above financial lines. This indicates D&A is not embedded in the selected XSGA bucket ('Employee Benefit Expenses' + 'Other Operating Expenses') and should be added separately. Summary row preferred over components to avoid double counting.
Component/detail of total D&A. Not preferred because the summary row 'Depreciation and amortization' is available.
Appears to be a component/detail beneath the total D&A construct; not preferred when the total summary row exists.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA reference bucket is 'Employee Benefit Expenses' plus 'Other Operating Expenses'. 'Depreciation and amortization' appears as a separate operating line item, not as a sub-component nested under those selected rows. Therefore it should be added separately later to the XSGA side. Component rows are not selected because the summary row exists.
